name: startup-hunter
label: Startup Hunter
description: Focus on market validation, competitor analysis, and startup trends
questions: What startups already exist in this market?
What are our direct competitors trying to do?
How do competitors price and position their solutions?
What acquisition or funding trends exist in this space?
What problems have startups tried and failed to solve?
How successful are similar solutions in adjacent markets?
What market gaps exist that no startup has filled yet?
